auth_layout_forgot_description: Parolni tiklash ham shu himoyalangan auth oynasida qoladi, foydalanuvchi chalg'imasdan kirishni tiklaydi.
auth_layout_login_description: Animatsiyali, ixcham va xavfsiz kirish oynasi. Headerda ortiqcha ro'yxatdan o'tish elementlari yo'q.
auth_layout_permissions_description: Ruxsatlar, sessiyalar va tiklash jarayoni bitta yaxlit interfeysda qoladi.
auth_layout_recover_credentials_title: Xavfsiz hududdan chiqmasdan kirish ma'lumotlarini tiklang.
auth_layout_reset_password_title: Yangi parol o'rnating va ish maydoniga qayting.
auth_layout_verification_description: Tasdiqlash va parolni yangilash bir xil vizual qobiq va xavfsizlik yo'riqlari ichida boshqariladi.
auth_layout_verify_description: Email tasdiqlash shu yagona auth muhitida ko'rsatiladi, e'tiborni chalg'itadigan ortiqcha tablar yo'q.
management_roles_backend_hint: System rolelar backend tomonidan himoyalanishi mumkin.
management_statuses_hint: Inactive statuslar ham list ichida qoladi.
navigation_ai_description: CEO assistent chati backend metadata va prompt shortcutlari bilan.
navigation_auth_description: Kirish, ro'yxatdan o'tish va tiklash auth oqimlari.
navigation_ceo_dashboard_description: Rahbar metrikalari, operatsion highlightlar va kunlik samaradorlik ko'rsatkichlari.
navigation_crm_description: Mijozlar, filtrlar, statuslar va savdo samaradorligi.
navigation_management_description: Statuslar, rollar va sahifa registri boshqaruvi bitta modulda.
navigation_member_dashboard_description: Haftalik update progressi va maosh snapshoti bilan shaxsiy panel.
navigation_projects_description: Loyihalar, doskalar va kanban workflowlarni boshqaring.
navigation_team_links_description: Rasmiy ijtimoiy sahifalar va operatsion bot havolalari bitta branded markazda.
navigation_updates_description: Update tracking, so'nggi faollik, topshirilmaganlar va company stats bo'limi.
navigation_users_description: Foydalanuvchilar boshqaruvi, rol kirishi va ruxsat nazorati.
navigation_website_description: Website admin auth, blog CRUD va publishing stats bo'limi.
navigation_workday_description: Update tracking uchun bayramlar va qisqa ish kunlarini yarating.
permission_catalog_crm_description: CRM mijoz paneli va status boshqaruvi.
permission_catalog_projects_description: Projects, boards va kanban workflow bo'limi.
permission_catalog_updates_description: Update tracking va company stats bo'limi.
updates_missing_member_id: Joriy sessiyada yaroqli member ID yo'q.
